ATOLL SDK SHOWCASE

atoll-js

Live Activities, Lock Screen Widgets, and Notch Experiences

Disconnected
  • Setup
  • Live Activities
  • Lock Widgets
  • Notch
  • Event Log

How to Run

  1. Launch Atoll on macOS and enable RPC Server on port 9020.
  2. Keep this page open and wait for automatic connection.
  3. Click Request Authorization.
  4. Run any demo card below.

Notes

  • Lock screen widgets appear when your Mac is locked.
  • Flight animation demos are in Notch Experiences.
  • Use Event Log to inspect real-time Atoll events.

Live Activities

Dynamic status cards in the notch, including progress, timer, marquee, spectrum, and flight tracking.

Lock Screen Widgets

Inline, card, circular, and custom web widgets rendered via the same descriptor APIs as the full demo.

Notch Experiences

Tab and minimal modes, plus a Canvas flight animation that updates as progress changes.

Event Log

Connection, authorization, lifecycle, and dismissal events streamed from Atoll.

RPC Activity

atoll-js showcase for GitHub Pages. GitHub • Atoll App
